====''[[Pokémon the Series: Black & White]]''====
Marlon appeared in ''[[BW094|The Road to Humilau!]]'', where {{un|Cameron}} aimed to challenge his [[Gym]] for his final [[Badge]]. After Cameron and {{Ash}} lost their way to [[Humilau City]], Marlon found the two {{pkmn|Trainer}}s and took them to his Gym. There, he faced Cameron in a [[Gym]] {{pkmn|battle}}. Although Marlon had a powerful [[Party|team]], he was defeated by Cameron's {{p|Samurott}}, giving Cameron his last Gym Badge.
